SQLLite.SQL: SELECT SE.EVENT_ID AS "StandardEventId" , SE.DESCRIPTION AS "EventDescription" , SE.CATEGORY AS "Category" , SE.EDIT_DETAILS As "EditDetails" FROM STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE SE.EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper
